name: FlowAlpha
description: FlowAlpha — a sovereign quant desk: live market data, indicators, rule strategies, server-side backtests, and parameter optimization with full metrics. One engine driven by both you (GUI) and agents (tools). White-label, no API key, no database, public market data. The closed loop: data → indicator → strategy → backtest → optimize → metrics.

operations.name: get_price
operations.description: Get the latest price for any market symbol — crypto (BTCUSDT), stocks (AAPL), forex (EURUSD=X), indices (^GSPC). Public data, no key (crypto via Binance, the rest via Yahoo).

operations.name: get_klines
operations.description: Get recent OHLCV candles for any symbol (crypto/stock/forex/index) at an interval (1m/5m/15m/1h/4h/1d). Crypto via Binance, stocks/forex via Yahoo, no key.

operations.name: search_symbols
operations.description: Search available market symbols by a query fragment (e.g. 'BTC').

operations.name: list_indicators
operations.description: List the built-in technical indicators and their parameters.

operations.name: compute_indicator
operations.description: Compute a technical indicator series over a symbol's candles. indicator: sma|ema|rsi|macd|bollinger|atr|obv|stoch|vwap|adx|supertrend.

operations.name: custom_indicator
operations.description: Compute a CUSTOM indicator from a safe formula over close/open/high/low/volume using sma/ema/rsi/abs/log/sqrt and arithmetic (e.g. 'sma(close,20)-sma(close,50)' or '(high-low)/close*100'). Evaluated by an AST whitelist — arbitrary code can never run. Returns the series.

operations.name: list_strategies
operations.description: List the 8 built-in strategies + default params (sma_cross, ema_cross, rsi_threshold, macd_cross, macd_zero, bollinger_bounce, triple_ma, supertrend).

operations.name: run_backtest
operations.description: Backtest a strategy on a symbol with realistic risk controls. strategy: sma_cross|ema_cross|rsi_threshold|macd_cross. direction: long|short|both. Optional stop-loss/take-profit/trailing-stop (%) and slippage (bps). Returns equity curve, trades (with side + exit reason: signal/SL/TP/trail) and metrics (return, buy&hold, win rate, max drawdown, Sharpe, Sortino, Calmar, profit factor). Saves as shared state.

operations.name: run_optimize
operations.description: Parameter sweep: backtest a strategy across a grid of parameters and return the best by `rank_by` (total_return_pct|sharpe|win_rate_pct), plus the ranked results table. Default grid per strategy; pass `grid` to override.

operations.name: get_last_backtest
operations.description: Get the most recent backtest result (shared state).

operations.name: compare_strategies
operations.description: Backtest ALL built-in strategies on a symbol and return their metrics ranked by total return — a side-by-side comparison vs buy & hold.

operations.name: regime_detection
operations.description: Classify the current market regime for a symbol (trending_up / trending_down / ranging / volatile) from ADX, ATR%, and SMA slope, with a strategy hint.

operations.name: backtest_history
operations.description: List the recent backtest runs (most recent first) — symbol, strategy, direction, return, Sharpe, trades.

operations.name: multi_timeframe
operations.description: Check a strategy's signal across multiple timeframes (default 1d/4h/1h) and report alignment (all_long/all_flat/mixed) — for higher-timeframe confirmation.

operations.name: ai_analyze
operations.description: AI market analysis for a symbol, grounded ONLY on FlowAlpha's own engine output (live price, RSI, an sma_cross backtest) — no invented numbers. Runs through the sovereign Flowork router (no third-party LLM key). Returns a concise neutral analysis.

operations.name: portfolio_get
operations.description: Get the PAPER (virtual, no real money) portfolio: cash, open positions marked to live price with unrealized P&L, total equity, realized P&L, and total return.

operations.name: paper_buy
operations.description: PAPER buy: spend `quote_amount` (e.g. USDT) of virtual cash on `symbol` at the live price. No real money, no broker. Updates the shared paper portfolio.

quote_amount.description: amount of quote currency to spend (e.g. 1000)

operations.name: paper_sell
operations.description: PAPER sell: sell `qty` of an open position (default: all) at the live price, realizing P&L into virtual cash. No real money.

operations.name: paper_reset
operations.description: Reset the paper portfolio back to the starting virtual cash (clears positions and orders).

operations.name: list_paper_orders
operations.description: List recent paper orders (newest first).

operations.name: portfolio_equity
operations.description: The paper portfolio's equity curve over time (snapshots taken as bots run).

operations.name: get_ticker_24h
operations.description: 24h market stats for a symbol: last price, 24h change %, high, low, base/quote volume, trade count.

operations.name: top_movers
operations.description: Top gainers and losers over 24h for a quote currency (e.g. USDT). Useful for market scanning.

operations.name: live_status
operations.description: Whether real-money LIVE trading is armed. It is OWNER-GATED: disabled unless the owner sets FLOWALPHA_LIVE_ENABLED=1 on the host AND configures a broker. Agents cannot enable it. Default is paper-only.

operations.name: live_order
operations.description: Place a REAL-money order. OWNER-GATED: refuses unless the owner armed live trading (FLOWALPHA_LIVE_ENABLED) and configured a broker — an agent can never enable it. Returns a safe refusal otherwise. Use paper_buy/paper_sell for risk-free trading.

operations.name: watchlist_get
operations.description: Get the watchlist symbols with their current live prices (multi-asset).

operations.name: watchlist_add
operations.description: Add a symbol to the watchlist (crypto/stock/forex).

operations.name: watchlist_remove
operations.description: Remove a symbol from the watchlist.

operations.name: alert_add
operations.description: Add a price alert: fire when `symbol` goes above|below `price`. Multi-asset.

operations.name: alert_list
operations.description: List all price alerts (with triggered status).

operations.name: alert_remove
operations.description: Remove a price alert by id.

operations.name: alert_check
operations.description: Check all un-triggered alerts against live prices; mark + return any that fired. The GUI polls this; an agent can poll it too to watch the market.

operations.name: bot_add
operations.description: Add a PAPER trading bot: a strategy that runs continuously on the paper portfolio for a symbol. No real money.

operations.name: bot_list
operations.description: List paper bots + last run time.

operations.name: bot_remove
operations.description: Remove a paper bot by id.

operations.name: bot_toggle
operations.description: Enable/disable a paper bot by id.

operations.name: bot_step
operations.description: Run ONE step for all enabled paper bots: evaluate each bot's strategy signal and buy/sell on the paper portfolio accordingly. The GUI/agent calls this on a timer so strategies run live on paper. Returns the actions taken.
